criteria.evidence: src/lib/ollama.js created with all three named exports

criteria.description: isAvailable() uses a 2-second timeout; returns false on any error
criteria.evidence: AbortSignal.timeout(2000) in ollamaFetch; tests/unit/ollama.test.js covers timeout + network error cases

criteria.description: Config via VITAL_OLLAMA_URL and VITAL_OLLAMA_MODEL env vars
criteria.evidence: Module reads env vars at load time; documented in .env.example

criteria.description: ai-findings.js calls ollama.chat() when available; adds ollama_summary field
criteria.evidence: buildAiFindings() is async; calls isAvailable()+chat(); spreads ollama_summary conditionally into output doc

criteria.description: No change to output shape when Ollama is absent
criteria.evidence: All 10 existing ai-findings unit tests pass with fetch stubbed to unavailable
npm run check:ollama verified live against Ollama server; --json flag outputs valid JSON; exit 0 always
Uses only node:crypto and globalThis.fetch (Node 18+ built-in); package.json unchanged
